response: there are 420 pencils in a jar. if 67 of the pencils are blue, 81 of the pencils are yellow, how many of the pencils are neither blue nor yellow? the total number of pencils is 420. the number of pencils that are blue or yellow is 67 + 81 = 148. the number of pencils that are neither blue nor yellow is 420 - 148 = 272. the highlighted section is the calculation of the total number of pencils. the highlighted section is the calculation of the number of pencils that are neither blue nor yellow. is there anything else i can help with? winner
